# SARIV

> SARIV designs and builds digital products that feel timeless, intentional, and technically exceptional. We engineer precise, enduring tools rather than chase trends.

SARIV is a small product studio. FreeFlow, our flagship product, is a native macOS app for recording auto-zooming, non-destructive product demos.

## Pages

- [Home](https://sariv-web.vercel.app/): Studio overview and philosophy
- [Work](https://sariv-web.vercel.app/work): Case studies and shipped projects
- [FreeFlow](https://sariv-web.vercel.app/products/freeflow): Native macOS screen recording app
- [Identity System](https://sariv-web.vercel.app/identity): Design system, logomark, typography, and color tokens
- [About](https://sariv-web.vercel.app/about): Engineering principles and studio philosophy
- [Journal](https://sariv-web.vercel.app/journal): Writing on design and engineering
- [Start a Project](https://sariv-web.vercel.app/start-project): Project inquiry form
- [Contact](https://sariv-web.vercel.app/contact): General contact form
